english: 1. num. fig.: 78. — 2. the contrary of p'a (pha) II., root of the words signifying hitherward, on this side; tsú-k'a (tshu kha) Cs. (tsúr-k'a (tshur kha) q. v.), more frq. tsú-rol (tshu rol) this side (opp. to p'a-rol (pha rol)), tsú-rol-na (tshu rol na) adv. on this side, postp. with genit. adj. on this side; tsú-rol-tu (tshu rol tu), this way, to this place; tsú-rol-nas (tshu rol nas) from this side; tsú-rol-pa (tshu rol pa) one on this side, one belonging to this (our) party Stg.; tsu-b'i (tshu bi) one of this side, p'a-b'i (pha bi) one of the other side Cs., provinc. (?). Cf. tsun (tshun), tsur (tshur).

C., prob. Chinese, for the Tibetan skyúr-ru (skyur ru), acc. to some: vinegar, acc. to others: a pulpy product, prepared of various kinds of fruit, mixed with vinegar, sugar, and spices, and having been left to ferment, used, like mustard, as a condiment, which in India is called 'chutney'.
1. Sch.: 'group, object' (?); tsúg-so (tshug so) W. all the households or villages placed under one Gopa. — 2. rarely for tsug (tshug); thus j'i-tsug (ji tshug) Glr. 49, inst. of c'i-tsug (ci tshug).

W. to, up to, till, gaṅ tsúg-pa (gang tshug pa) how far, how long? *na Nyúṅ-ti-ru c'á-c'e tsúg-pa-la* (*na nyung ti ru cha che tshug pa la*) until I go to Sultanpur; gaṅ tsúg-pa ... de tsúg-pa (gang tshug pa ... de tshug pa) so far as.

1. v. _atsugs-pa ('tshugs pa). — 2. to do one harm, to hurt, to inflict, mostly with a negative, bar-c'ád ma tsúgs-par (bar chad ma tshugs par) without having hurt me Mil.; nà-la mes, nad-kyis etc. mi tsugs (na la mes, nad kyis etc. mi tshugs) fire, disease etc. can do me no harm, Glr., Mil., frq. — 3. sbst., also tsúgs-k'aṅ (tshugs khang), W. *tsug-sa* (*tshug sa*), caravansary, or merely a level, open place near a village, where traveller's may encamp, or where public business is transacted; also for धर्मशाला, hall of judgment; hospital.

= tsu (tshu) 2., gen. with c'ad (chad) or cad (cad) or la (la), signifying within, by, not later than, as postp. c. accus., rabs bdun tsun-c'ád (rabs bdun tshun chad) within seven generations, (they will be happy) even to the seventh generation, Dzl.; saṅ-g'i nyi-ma - p'yéd tsún - la (sang gi nyi ma phyed tshun la) by to-morrow noon (it must be finished) Glr.; *dá-wa c'e' tsun 'é leb* (*da wa che' tshun e leb*) C. shall he come in less than half a month? bu daṅ bú-mo tsun-c'ád (bu dang bu mo tshun chad) even to the children, not even the children being excluded Tar. 119, 3. — Note. In the terms p'an (phan) and tsun (tshun), like yan (yan) and man(-c'ád) (man (-chad)), the significations given by Cs.: from, from a certain place or time forward, till, until, are not properly inherent to the word, but are to be inferred in each separate instance from the figurative application of the original sense of the root.

_otsúb-ma ('tshub ma) storm, tsub-c'éb (tshub cheb), rluṅ-tsúb (rlung tshub) gale, hurricane, k'a-tsub (kha tshub) snow-storm; bu-tsub (bu tshub) (p'u-tsub? (phu tshub?)) gust of wind, (lha) _odrei bu-tsub ((lha) 'drei bu tshub) whirlwind; fig. p'rag-dóg-g'i tsúb-ma (phrag dog gi tshub ma) Mil. a violent fit of envy; sems-tsúb (sems tshub) trouble of mind Cs.

hither, to this place, hitherward (cf. p'ar (phar)), tsur śog (tshur shog) (resp. gśegs (gshegs), in later lit. byon (byon)) come hither, come here! also in an objective sense: tsur _óṅ-ba (tshur 'ong ba) to return home Pth., Tar.; _odí-nas tsur bśád-nas ('di nas tshur bshad nas) speaking to me through this (tube) Glr.; almost pleon. in tsúr-la nyon (tshur la nyon) listen to me! Mil. frq.; tsúr-k'a (tshur kha) this side, the this side river-bank, declivity, party etc., similarly: tsúr - logs (tshur logs), tsúr-p'yogs (tshur phyogs).

colouring matter, pigment, prob. = sa-tsúr (sa tshur) Stg., acc. to Cs. mineral paint, nag- (nag-) black, ser- (ser-) yellow, dmar-tsúr (dmar tshur) red-paint; for nag tsúr (nag tshur) Sch. has: green vitriol; in Zam. also rús-kyi tsur (rus kyi tshur) is named.

1. manner, way, form, character, nature, tsul j'i-ltar ... de bz'in-du (tshul ji ltar ... de bzhin du) as — so Wdn., zér-tsul (zer tshul), _ogrúl-tsul ('grul tshul), bsám-tsul (bsam tshul) the way in which a person speaks, walks, thinks; gnás-tsul (gnas tshul) v. gnás-pa (gnas pa); gnás-tsul (gnas tshul) and snáṅ-tsul (snang tshul) being and appearing, philosoph. terms for reality and appearance Was. (297); gtóṅ-tsul (gtong tshul) the way of giving, i.e. a certain quantity given, dose Stg.; mi sdug-pai sna-tsógs-kyis (mi sdug pai sna tshogs kyis) (to damage) in various vicious ways Mil.; tsul de kó-nas (tshul de ko nas) by that same way of proceeding Tar.; hence tsúl-gyis (tshul gyis) in consequence of, by means of Pth. and elsewhere; sṅan smrás-pai tsul (sngan smras pai tshul) the character of his last speech Dzl.; rgya-bód-kyi _obrél-tsul (rgya bod kyi 'brel tshul) the mode or kind of intercourse, the
